calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DUANE VALZ's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

The unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. The arbitrator's award, attached as Exhibit B to the notice of hearing, is confirmed. Petitioner Duane R. Valz may present a proposed judgment awarding Valz $177,092.27 on the loan, filing costs and arbitrator compensation of $6,156.50. The judgment should be joint and several against respondents Echad Energy Solutions, LLC, and Vincent Rogers. Interest will accrue post-judgment at the statutory rate of 10%, not the contract rate. Valz shall provide a copy of the proposed judgment to respondents, who may lodge objections within 10 days.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
